<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Sreeja — Senior Business Analyst in Analytics turned AI Engineer</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --bg: #faf8f5;
  --dark: #0f0e0c;
  --cream: #f2ede6;
  --accent: #c8602a;
  --accent2: #2a6cc8;
  --muted: #8a8070;
  --border: #e0d8ce;
  --card: #ffffff;
  --serif: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  --sans: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
}

* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--dark);
  font-family: var(--sans);
  
  overflow-x: hidden;
  cursor: default;
}



/* Nav */
a, button { cursor: pointer; }

nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  padding: 22px 60px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  background: rgba(250,248,245,0.92);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.nav-logo {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  color: var(--dark);
  text-decoration: none;
}

.nav-logo span { color: var(--accent2); }

.nav-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 36px;
  list-style: none;
}

.nav-links a {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--muted);
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent); }

/* Hero */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 120px 60px 80px;
  gap: 60px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.hero::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: -200px; top: -200px;
  width: 700px; height: 700px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(200,96,42,0.08) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-tag {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}

.hero-tag::before {
  content: '';
  width: 30px; height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}

.hero h1 {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: clamp(48px, 5vw, 76px);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -2px;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
}

.hero h1 em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--accent);
}

.hero-desc {
  font-size: 17px;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.75;
  max-width: 480px;
  margin-bottom: 40px;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.hero-btns {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--dark);
  color: white;
  padding: 14px 32px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}

.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-2px); }

.btn-outline {
  border: 1.5px solid var(--dark);
  color: var(--dark);
  padding: 14px 32px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.btn-outline:hover { background: var(--dark); color: white; transform: translateY(-2px); }

/* Hero stats */
.hero-right {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
}

.stat-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
}

.stat-card {
  background: var(--card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 28px 24px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
}

.stat-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.stat-card::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--accent);
  transform: scaleX(0);
  transition: transform 0.3s;
}

.stat-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

.stat-num {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 42px;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--dark);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.stat-num span { color: var(--accent); }

.stat-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 500;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.company-strip {
  background: var(--cream);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.company-strip .label {
  font-size: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-right: 8px;
}

.company-badge {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  color: var(--dark);
}

/* Section base */
section {
  padding: 100px 60px;
}

.section-label {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 3px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}

.section-label::before {
  content: '';
  width: 30px; height: 1px;
  background: var(--accent);
}

.section-title {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 52px);
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -1.5px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

/* About */
.about { background: var(--cream); }

.about-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
  gap: 80px;
  align-items: start;
  margin-top: 60px;
}

.about-left {}

.about-img-placeholder {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--dark) 0%, #2a2520 100%);
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: white;
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 80px;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -3px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.about-img-placeholder::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 70%, rgba(200,96,42,0.3) 0%, transparent 60%);
}

.about-img-placeholder .initials {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  font-style: italic;
}

.about-img-placeholder .role-tag {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 24px;
  left: 24px;
  right: 24px;
  font-family: var(--sans);
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  opacity: 0.6;
  font-weight: 400;
}

.about-right {}

.about-text {
  font-size: 17px;
  line-height: 1.85;
  color: #3a3530;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.about-text strong { color: var(--dark); font-weight: 600; }

.skills-section { margin-top: 40px; }

.skills-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.skill-group { margin-bottom: 20px; }

.skill-group-name {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--dark);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.skill-pills {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.pill {
  font-size: 12px;
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-weight: 500;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: white;
  color: var(--dark);
  transition: all 0.2s;
}

.pill:hover {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: white;
  border-color: var(--accent);
}

.pill.ai {
  background: rgba(200,96,42,0.08);
  border-color: rgba(200,96,42,0.3);
  color: var(--accent);
}

/* Experience Timeline */
.experience { background: var(--bg); }

.exp-timeline {
  margin-top: 60px;
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 32px;
}

.exp-timeline::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; top: 8px; bottom: 0;
  width: 1px;
  background: var(--border);
}

.exp-item {
  position: relative;
  margin-bottom: 56px;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
  transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
}

.exp-item.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

.exp-dot {
  position: absolute;
  left: -38px;
  top: 6px;
  width: 12px; height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--accent);
  border: 3px solid var(--bg);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--accent);
}

.exp-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.exp-company {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--dark);
}

.exp-period {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--muted);
  background: var(--cream);
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.exp-role {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.exp-points {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.exp-points li {
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #5a5550;
  padding-left: 16px;
  position: relative;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.exp-points li::before {
  content: '→';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 12px;
}

/* Projects */
.projects { background: var(--dark); }

.projects .section-label { color: #c8602a; }
.projects .section-title { color: white; }
.projects .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }

.projects-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 60px;
}

.project-card {
  background: #1a1915;
  border: 1px solid #2a2820;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 32px;
  transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.project-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--accent);
  transform: scaleX(0);
  transition: transform 0.4s;
}

.project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: #3a3830; }
.project-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

.project-tag {
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.project-icon { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 16px; }

.project-title {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  line-height: 1.3;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}

.project-desc {
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #8a8070;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.project-impact {
  background: rgba(200,96,42,0.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(200,96,42,0.2);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.project-impact-label {
  font-size: 9px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.project-impact-text {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #c8a898;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.project-tech {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
}

.tech-tag {
  font-size: 10px;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  color: #6a6860;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* Contact */
.contact { background: var(--cream); }

.contact-inner {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 80px;
  margin-top: 60px;
  align-items: start;
}

.contact-info {}

.contact-tagline {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.3;
  letter-spacing: -1px;
  margin-bottom: 24px;
  color: var(--dark);
}

.contact-tagline em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }

.contact-text {
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 40px;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.contact-details {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

.contact-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--dark);
  transition: color 0.2s;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.contact-item:hover { color: var(--accent); }

.contact-item-icon {
  width: 40px; height: 40px;
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 2px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 16px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}

.contact-item:hover .contact-item-icon {
  background: var(--accent);
  border-color: var(--accent);
}

.social-links {
  margin-top: 40px;
}

.social-title {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.social-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
}

.social-btn {
  padding: 10px 20px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--dark);
  background: white;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
}

.social-btn:hover {
  background: var(--dark);
  color: white;
  border-color: var(--dark);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

/* Right side form-like card */
.contact-card {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 40px;
}

.contact-card-title {
  font-family: var(--serif);
  font-size: 24px;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}

.contact-card-sub {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: 32px;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.availability-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  background: rgba(200,96,42,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,229,192,0.2);
  padding: 10px 18px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--accent);
  margin-bottom: 28px;
}

.availability-dot {
  width: 8px; height: 8px;
  background: #22c55e;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1.3); }
}

.open-to {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}

.open-to-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 12px;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--dark);
  font-weight: 400;
}

.open-to-item::before {
  content: '✓';
  width: 24px; height: 24px;
  background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1);
  color: #22c55e;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.location-note {
  margin-top: 28px;
  padding-top: 24px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--muted);
  line-height: 1.7;
}

/* Footer */
footer {
  background: var(--dark);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 32px 60px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 300;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 12px;
}

footer span { color: var(--accent); }

/* Animations */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.hero-left > * {
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.7s ease forwards;
}

.hero-left .hero-tag { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.hero-left h1 { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
.hero-left .hero-desc { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
.hero-left .hero-btns { animation-delay: 0.55s; }

.hero-right {
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.5s forwards;
}

/* Mobile */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  nav { padding: 18px 24px; }
  .nav-links { display: none; }
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 100px 24px 60px; }
  .hero-right { display: none; }
  section { padding: 70px 24px; }
  .about-grid, .contact-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
  .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  footer { padding: 24px; flex-direction: column; text-align: center; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>




<!-- Nav -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">Sreeja</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-tag">Senior Business Analyst in Analytics turned AI Engineer</div>
    <h1>Turning Data<br>into <em>Decisions</em><br>& Products</h1>
    <p class="hero-desc">Senior Analytics professional with 4+ years at Adobe, Google & Flipkart. I bridge the gap between raw data and business outcomes — and now building AI-powered analytics systems.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Projects</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Get in Touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <div class="stat-grid">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">$11<span>M</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Quarterly Revenue Impact</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">20<span>%</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Conversion Lift at Adobe</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">50<span>+</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Stakeholders Served</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">4<span>+</span></div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years of Experience</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="company-strip">
      <span class="label">Worked at</span>
      <span class="company-badge">Adobe</span>
      <span class="company-badge">Google</span>
      <span class="company-badge">Flipkart</span>
      <span class="company-badge">Swiggy</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- About -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="section-label">About Me</div>
  <div class="section-title">Data Analyst<br>turned <em>AI Builder</em></div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-left">
      <div class="about-img-wrapper" style="position:relative;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sreeja" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;display:block;"/>
        <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:20px 24px;background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(15,14,12,0.85) 0%, transparent 100%);">
          <div style="font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-weight:400;">Senior Analytics · AI Engineering · Bangalore</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-right">
      <p class="about-text">
        I'm <strong>Sreeja</strong>, a Senior Business Analyst and emerging AI Engineer based in Bangalore. Over 4+ years, I've led analytics initiatives across product, marketing, and engineering at companies like <strong>Adobe, Google, and Flipkart</strong> — always focused on turning complex data into decisions that actually move the needle.
      </p>
      <p class="about-text">
        What sets me apart is my transition into <strong>AI Engineering</strong> — I'm now building LLM-powered systems, intelligent chatbots, and automated analytics pipelines that reduce human effort and unlock insights at scale. My MBA in Data Science & Analytics from Jain University grounds this in strong theory.
      </p>
      <p class="about-text">
        I believe the future belongs to analysts who can <strong>build</strong> — not just interpret. That's who I'm becoming.
      </p>

      <div class="skills-section">
        <div class="skills-title">Core Skills</div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-name">Analytics & BI</div>
          <div class="skill-pills">
            <span class="pill">Power BI</span>
            <span class="pill">Tableau</span>
            <span class="pill">Adobe Analytics</span>
            <span class="pill">CJA</span>
            <span class="pill">A/B Testing</span>
            <span class="pill">SQL</span>
            <span class="pill">BigQuery</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-name">AI Engineering</div>
          <div class="skill-pills">
            <span class="pill ai">LLM APIs</span>
            <span class="pill ai">RAG Systems</span>
            <span class="pill ai">LangChain</span>
            <span class="pill ai">Python</span>
            <span class="pill ai">Chatbot Dev</span>
            <span class="pill ai">Azure Databricks</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-group">
          <div class="skill-group-name">Data & Cloud</div>
          <div class="skill-pills">
            <span class="pill">ETL Pipelines</span>
            <span class="pill">Azure</span>
            <span class="pill">AWS</span>
            <span class="pill">Predictive Models</span>
            <span class="pill">Adobe Sensei</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Experience -->
<section class="experience" id="experience">
  <div class="section-label">Career</div>
  <div class="section-title">Where I've<br>Made Impact</div>
  <div class="exp-timeline">

    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div class="exp-company">Adobe</div>
        <span class="exp-period">Feb 2025 – Present</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-role">Digital Analyst · Contract via OmHRA</div>
      <ul class="exp-points">
        <li>Led end-to-end analytics for checkout and monetization journeys — drove ~20% conversion lift and ~$11M quarterly revenue</li>
        <li>Built AI-powered chatbot for A/B test interpretation, reducing analyst review time by 60% across 15+ experiments</li>
        <li>Developed Power BI dashboards integrating Azure Databricks ETL pipelines — served 50+ stakeholders, cut manual reporting by 40%</li>
        <li>Used CJA, Adobe Analytics, and Adobe Sensei to analyze behavior, forecast trends, and identify funnel bottlenecks</li>
        <li>Resolved 25+ data discrepancies and instrumentation gaps, improving reporting accuracy by 30%</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div class="exp-company">Google</div>
        <span class="exp-period">Aug 2022 – Aug 2023</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-role">Business Analyst II · Contract via TeamLease Digital</div>
      <ul class="exp-points">
        <li>Increased Play Store app discoverability by 20% and user engagement by 15% through merchandising analytics</li>
        <li>Reduced data processing time by 30% via automated BigQuery-SQL reporting systems</li>
        <li>Executed A/B and multivariate tests improving app downloads by 10% and engagement by 25%</li>
        <li>Developed predictive user-centric models to optimize experience and app performance for developers</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div class="exp-company">Flipkart</div>
        <span class="exp-period">May 2021 – Jun 2022</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-role">Associate Business Analyst</div>
      <ul class="exp-points">
        <li>Delivered daily insights and performance reports using Adobe Analytics and SQL for 5+ cross-functional teams</li>
        <li>Analyzed 20+ A/B experiments with statistical validation, informing post-launch strategies</li>
        <li>Resolved 15+ data anomalies, reducing conversion drops by 12%</li>
        <li>Automated reporting processes, boosting data delivery efficiency by 40%</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-item">
      <div class="exp-dot"></div>
      <div class="exp-header">
        <div class="exp-company">Swiggy</div>
        <span class="exp-period">Aug 2017 – May 2020</span>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-role">Supervisor – Central Vendor Management</div>
      <ul class="exp-points">
        <li>Improved team efficiency by 25% through leadership and operational workflow optimization</li>
        <li>Converted operational data into insights, boosting decision-making speed by 30%</li>
        <li>Led cross-functional teams resolving escalations, improving vendor satisfaction by 18–20%</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- Projects -->
<section class="projects" id="projects">
  <div class="section-label">Work</div>
  <div class="section-title">Projects That<br><em>Speak Results</em></div>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-tag">🤖 AI Engineering · Adobe</div>
      <div class="project-title">A/B Test Intelligence Chatbot</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Built an LLM-powered chatbot that ingests A/B test results from Adobe Target and AJO, interprets statistical significance, and generates plain-English recommendations for non-technical stakeholders — eliminating manual analyst bottlenecks.</div>
      <div class="project-impact">
        <div class="project-impact-label">Business Impact</div>
        <div class="project-impact-text">60% reduction in analyst review time · 15+ experiments automated monthly</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-tech">
        <span class="tech-tag">Python</span><span class="tech-tag">LangChain</span><span class="tech-tag">OpenAI API</span><span class="tech-tag">Adobe Target</span><span class="tech-tag">AJO</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-tag">📊 AI Dashboard · Adobe</div>
      <div class="project-title">Automated Insights Dashboard Engine</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Designed an AI layer on top of Power BI dashboards that auto-generates narrative summaries of KPI changes. Connected Azure Databricks ETL pipelines to surface anomalies and trend shifts with zero manual intervention.</div>
      <div class="project-impact">
        <div class="project-impact-label">Business Impact</div>
        <div class="project-impact-text">40% less manual reporting · Single source of truth for 50+ stakeholders</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-tech">
        <span class="tech-tag">Power BI</span><span class="tech-tag">Azure Databricks</span><span class="tech-tag">Python</span><span class="tech-tag">GPT API</span><span class="tech-tag">SQL</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-tag">🔍 Decision Intelligence · Google</div>
      <div class="project-title">Play Store Recommendation Analytics Engine</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Built a predictive analytics engine using BigQuery and ML models to optimize Play Store app recommendations and merchandising placements. Combined user-centric and visitor-centric signals for personalization at scale.</div>
      <div class="project-impact">
        <div class="project-impact-label">Business Impact</div>
        <div class="project-impact-text">20% discoverability increase · 25% engagement uplift</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-tech">
        <span class="tech-tag">BigQuery</span><span class="tech-tag">Google Analytics</span><span class="tech-tag">Python</span><span class="tech-tag">ML Models</span><span class="tech-tag">SQL</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-tag">🧠 RAG System · Personal Project</div>
      <div class="project-title">Marketing Analytics RAG Assistant</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that indexes internal analytics reports, campaign data, and business context. Teams can query it in natural language and get data-backed answers with citations — without touching dashboards.</div>
      <div class="project-impact">
        <div class="project-impact-label">Business Impact</div>
        <div class="project-impact-text">Democratizes data access · Reduces ad-hoc analyst requests by ~50%</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-tech">
        <span class="tech-tag">LlamaIndex</span><span class="tech-tag">ChromaDB</span><span class="tech-tag">FastAPI</span><span class="tech-tag">OpenAI</span><span class="tech-tag">Python</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-tag">📈 Predictive Analytics · Flipkart</div>
      <div class="project-title">Funnel Anomaly Detection System</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Developed an automated anomaly detection system using statistical models to flag conversion drops in real-time. Root cause analysis was automated and routed to the right team, replacing a manual 2-day investigation process.</div>
      <div class="project-impact">
        <div class="project-impact-label">Business Impact</div>
        <div class="project-impact-text">12% reduction in conversion drops · 15+ anomalies resolved</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-tech">
        <span class="tech-tag">Python</span><span class="tech-tag">Adobe Analytics</span><span class="tech-tag">SQL</span><span class="tech-tag">Statistical Models</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-tag">🎯 AI Strategy · Personal Project</div>
      <div class="project-title">Decision Intelligence Framework</div>
      <div class="project-desc">Designed a reusable consulting framework that wraps AI model outputs in business context — translating predictions into plain-language recommendations with risk scores and suggested actions for C-suite decision makers.</div>
      <div class="project-impact">
        <div class="project-impact-label">Business Impact</div>
        <div class="project-impact-text">Bridges AI outputs and business trust · Compliant with EU AI Act principles</div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-tech">
        <span class="tech-tag">Python</span><span class="tech-tag">LLM APIs</span><span class="tech-tag">Power BI</span><span class="tech-tag">SHAP</span><span class="tech-tag">FastAPI</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>


// Scroll animations
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.classList.add('visible');
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.1 });

document.querySelectorAll(
